'''Michael W. Royer''' (born [[June 28]], [[1940s#1941|1941]]) is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Wikipedia:letterer|letterer]] who lettered a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series. He often collaborated with Jack Kirby on ''The Demon, Mister Miracle, New Gods, The Eternals,'' ''Captain America ''&'' Kamandi, The Last Boy on Earth.''

{{Artist-stub}}
